title: WCD Balod Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Sahayak Posts
description: Women and Child Development Department, Balod (WCD Balod) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for Sahayak Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Intermediate (10+2) can grab this chance and apply for the WCD Balod Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested candidates can apply beforethe last date of application. I...
